title: T-013 — transport_lane_rate_cards + transport_lane_rate_audit + supersede chain (§10A.2.2, §10A.2.3, V-MS-25/27/28)
prompt:
# T-013 — transport_lane_rate_cards + audit + supersede chain

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10A.2.2, §10A.2.3, §10A.3.4 (supersede), §11.6 V-MS-25/26/27/28
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Add two tables: `transport_lane_rate_cards` (versioned, with approval workflow and supersede chain) and `transport_lane_rate_audit` (full lifecycle audit independent of supersede chain — required by BRCGS+FSMA 204 §5.2).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0049_lane_rate_cards.sql`:
   - CREATE TABLE transport_lane_rate_cards per §10A.2.2: id, org_id, lane_id (FK transport_lanes ON DELETE CASCADE), carrier, rate_type CHECK ('per_km','per_shipment','per_kg'), rate_value NUMERIC(12,4) CHECK (>=0), currency CHAR(3), effective_from DATE, effective_to DATE NULL, approval_status CHECK ('pending','active','expired','rejected') DEFAULT 'active', approved_by, approved_at, uploaded_by NOT NULL, uploaded_at, source_file_id, superseded_by (self-ref FK), CHECK (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to >= effective_from) — V-MS-25.
   - V-MS-27 currency: app-layer zod refinement against ISO 4217 list (DB CHECK length=3 + uppercase only).
   - INDEX idx_rate_cards_lane_active ON transport_lane_rate_cards(lane_id) WHERE approval_status='active' AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to >= CURRENT_DATE).
   - RLS org-scoped policy.
2. CREATE TABLE transport_lane_rate_audit per §10A.2.3: id, org_id, rate_card_id FK, action CHECK ('upload','approve','reject','expire','supersede','delete'), acted_by, acted_at, before_values JSONB, after_values JSONB, reason. RLS org-scoped.
3. SQL function `app.assert_rate_card_chain_acyclic()` invoked nightly via pg_cron — DFS over superseded_by graph; raise notice if cycle detected (V-MS-28).
4. Helper `packages/domain/src/transport-lanes/rate-card-supersede.ts` exports `supersedeRateCard(prevId, newRow, actor)` — transactional: previous row gets effective_to=CURRENT_DATE-1 and superseded_by=new.id; new row inserted; audit row written; supersede chain depth assertion (prevents O(N²) explosion via early loop detection).
5. Tests: V-MS-25 effective_to < effective_from rejected; V-MS-27 zod refinement (currency must be ISO-3 uppercase); V-MS-28 chain cycle detected; supersede happy path produces correct chain; rate_audit row exists for every lifecycle action.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0049_lane_rate_cards.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/transport-lane-rate-cards.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/transport-lane-rate-cards.zod.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/transport-lane-rate-audit.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/transport-lanes/rate-card-supersede.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/lane-rate-cards.test.ts [create]
- packages/domain/__tests__/transport-lanes/rate-card-supersede.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given migration 0049 applied, when \d transport_lane_rate_cards inspected, then all 16 cols + CHECK rate_value >= 0 + CHECK rate_type in 3 values + CHECK approval_status in 4 values + CHECK effective_to >= effective_from + partial index for active rates + RLS+FORCE RLS.
2. Given insert with effective_from='2026-05-01' effective_to='2026-04-01', when committed, then DB raises check_violation (V-MS-25).
3. Given zod input currency='usd', when parsed, then refinement rejects (V-MS-27 requires ISO 4217 uppercase 3-letter).
4. Given a supersede chain rate1 → rate2 → rate1 inserted by malicious update, when app.assert_rate_card_chain_acyclic runs, then notice 'cycle detected' raised (V-MS-28).
5. Given supersedeRateCard(prev, new) called, when tx commits, then prev.effective_to == CURRENT_DATE-1, prev.superseded_by == new.id, new row inserted, and transport_lane_rate_audit has 1 row action='supersede'.
6. Given rate is uploaded with approval_status='pending', when partial index is queried for active rates, then this row is NOT returned (V-MS-26 enforced at index level for cost suggestion).

## Test strategy
- RED: integration tests asserting V-MS-25 CHECK + V-MS-27 zod + V-MS-28 cycle detection + supersede helper transactionality + V-MS-26 partial-index exclusion + audit row per action before migration applied.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test:integration -- lane-rate-cards' + 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/domain test transport-lanes/rate-card-supersede'.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow effective_to < effective_from — V-MS-25 CHECK at DB.
- Do not allow lowercase currency — V-MS-27 zod refinement strict.
- Do not skip the cycle detection job — V-MS-28 critical (audit chain integrity).
- Do not let supersede operation run outside a tx — partial supersede leaves chain corrupt.
- Do not include pending rates in the active partial index — V-MS-26 explicit at index level (defense-in-depth vs query bugs).

pipeline_inputs.description: Create transport_lane_rate_cards (versioned via superseded_by) + transport_lane_rate_audit + supersede chain integrity job — V-MS-25 (effective_to >= effective_from) + V-MS-27 (ISO 4217 currency) + V-MS-28 (acyclic supersede chain) + V-MS-26 pending-rate exclusion logic primitive.

Constraints: 1.
